pay.setup_1: Create a Stripe account at stripe.com. Activate business account with VAT and IBAN.
pay.setup_2: Create Products + Prices in Stripe Dashboard (3 products: monthly, annual, lifetime) and copy the price_xxx IDs.
pay.setup_3: Add secrets in Supabase: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
pay.setup_4: Webhook in Stripe Dashboard pointing to stripe-webhook edge function.
pay.setup_5: Events to subscribe: checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.*, charge.refunded, payment_intent.payment_failed.
pay.setup_6: Fill company info in nl_platform_config (company_name, vat_number, company_address, support_email).

value_prop.body: Over 12,000 professionals have already transformed their careers with NeuroLearn. Up-to-date content, market-recognised certificates and real human support.
why.point1.body: Not auto-generated filler. Our courses are built and reviewed by working AI practitioners, with real-world examples and up-to-date industry context.
why.point2.body: AI moves fast. Our content is refreshed monthly so you're always learning what the market actually demands right now — not what was relevant two years ago.
why.point3.body: 100% practical focus. Every lesson includes real examples, working code and a concrete challenge to apply immediately in your job.
why.point4.body: Our certificates are verifiable online and increasingly requested by tech companies across Europe and beyond.
why.point5.body: Learn alongside thousands of professionals. Share projects, get unstuck and build your network in a community that's genuinely helpful.
why.point6.body: Our team responds within 24 hours. We're real people who know the content and genuinely want you to succeed.

testimonial1.text: In 3 months I went from "I know nothing about AI" to deploying an automated contract analysis system at my company. The ROI was positive in week one.
testimonial2.text: The LangChain Agents course changed my career. I received three job offers while still mid-course. The quality is in a different league.
testimonial3.text: As a non-technical manager I was sceptical. After the AI for Business course I automated our monthly reporting and saved 12 hours a week. Paid for itself in week two.

email.abandon.body:
Hello {{name}},

We noticed you're 70% through the "{{course_name}}" course.

Do you know what that means? You're almost ready to receive your certificate! Come back now and finish — it takes less than 2 hours.

Go for it! 💪
NeuroLearn Team
email.welcome.body:
Hello {{name}},

Welcome to the largest AI platform in Portuguese!

Your next step: start with the "{{recommended_course}}" course — it was specially chosen for your profile.

You have 7 days to try everything for free.

See you on the platform!
NeuroLearn Team

ai_routing.tip_body: Use Sonnet 4.5 for anything that is sold content (courses, lesson translation, blog generation). Haiku 4.5 is enough for classification, UI/legal translation and short messages. Opus only for the most critical cases — it is 5x more expensive than Sonnet.
